scenes.speech: Explore the treasure trove of Python libraries!
scenes.title: Using Libraries

scenes.speech: Collections of useful code made by others!
scenes.title: What are Libraries?
scenes.content: Libraries let you skip writing from scratch! Just import them and use powerful features right away!

scenes.title: pip - Package Manager
scenes.content: pip install numpy and similar commands install libraries. PyPI has over 300,000 packages!

scenes.title: NumPy - Numerical Computing
scenes.content: NumPy handles matrix and statistical calculations at high speed. The foundational library for AI and ML!
scenes.highlight: import numpy as np → ultimate number crunching

scenes.title: Pandas - Data Analysis
scenes.content: Excel-like data manipulation in Python. Easy data loading, transformation, and aggregation!
scenes.highlight: import pandas as pd → classic data analysis tool

scenes.title: Matplotlib - Graphing
scenes.content: Line charts, bar charts, scatter plots… import matplotlib.pyplot as plt to create graphs!

scenes.title: requests - Web Communication
scenes.content: requests.get(URL) fetches web page data. The basic library for getting data from APIs!

scenes.title: datetime - Dates and Times
scenes.content: from datetime import datetime → now = datetime.now() gets the current time!

scenes.speech: Libraries built into Python from the start!
scenes.title: Standard Library Treasure
scenes.content: os (files), sys (system), math (math), random (random numbers)… no installation needed!

scenes.speech: With libraries, your capabilities just expanded enormously!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
